name: Beginner
flavor: Just starting out on your heroic journey. You have potential but lack experience.

name: Novice
flavor: Developing your abilities and gaining confidence in your powers.

name: Developing
flavor: A competent hero who can handle most everyday threats reliably.

name: Competent
flavor: A professional hero with established capabilities and reputation.

name: Professional
flavor: A veteran hero with significant experience and refined abilities.

name: Expert
flavor: An expert hero whose skills are recognized and respected.

name: Veteran
flavor: An elite hero operating at the highest levels of competence.

name: Elite
flavor: A master hero pushing the boundaries of human capability.

name: Master
flavor: A legendary hero whose deeds inspire others and shape history.

name: Legendary
flavor: A world-class expert representing the absolute pinnacle of heroic achievement.
